summary: MRP (Material Requisition Planning) module testing completed. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Dashboard stats, MRP Runs tab, Draft POs tab, Model Forecasts tab, RM Parameters tab all working. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in Model Forecasts vertical filter.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty value caused React runtime error - FIXED

issues: RM Parameters not auto-loaded on tab switch - requires clicking Refresh button. Minor UX issue.

action_items: Consider auto-loading RM Parameters when switching to that tab (minor UX improvement)
critical_code_review_comments: MRPDashboard.js line 743: Fixed SelectItem value='' to value='all' to prevent React error
RM Parameters tab doesn't auto-fetch data on tab switch - fetchRMParams() not called in initial useEffect
Some RMs show 'UNASSIGNED' vendor and ₹0 cost - this is expected when no vendor_rm_prices exist for those RMs
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used - 1232 model forecasts, 1302 RM params, 8 MRP runs, 78 draft POs
context_for_next_testing_agent: MRP module fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/mrp/dashboard returns stats (total_runs, draft_pos, model_forecasts, rm_params). 2) GET /api/mrp/runs returns MRP calculation runs with status, SKUs, RMs, order value. 3) GET /api/mrp/runs/{id} returns detailed run with rm_requirements array. 4) POST /api/mrp/runs/calculate creates new MRP run. 5) POST /api/mrp/runs/{id}/generate-pos generates draft POs consolidated by vendor. 6) GET /api/mrp/draft-pos returns draft POs with lines. 7) GET /api/mrp/model-forecasts returns 1232 forecasts. 8) GET /api/mrp/rm-params returns 1302 RM procurement parameters. 9) Frontend tabs all working - MRP Runs, Draft POs, Model Forecasts, RM Parameters. 10) MRP Run detail dialog shows RM requirements breakdown.
